title: Strait of Hormuz Remains Effectively Blocked After Naval Skirmishes
summary_full: The U.S. Navy’s blockade continued to intercept ships trying to leave or enter Iranian ports, while fear of Iranian attacks kept other ships from attempting passage through the narrows.
summary_public: The U.S. Navy’s blockade continued to intercept ships trying to leave or enter Iranian ports, while fear of Iranian attacks kept other ships from attempting passage through the narrows.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: fear of Iranian attacks kept other ships from attempting passage
